note: Methodological: eval-logging bug + phase-transition characterization. See docs/pipeline-and-losses.md sec 6.

eval_logging_bug.symptom: only steps 2000,4000 logged for a 6000-step run; final eval never ran
eval_logging_bug.cause: eval fired on step%eval_every before increment; loop breaks at step==max_steps
eval_logging_bug.fix: final eval always runs at end of fit

phase_transition.note: seed-dependent -> source of NMI seed variance
